ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "financial_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of financial data (e.g., EV, Revenue) */,
  "financial_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial category (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  "financial_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business segment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the financial data */,
  "ttm" REAL /* Trailing twelve months (TTM) value */,
  "fy_2022" REAL /* Fiscal year 2022 value */,
  "fy_2021" REAL /* Fiscal year 2021 value */,
  "fy_2020" REAL /* Fiscal year 2020 value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_financial_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_category_id") REFERENCES financial_categories ("financial_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_financial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_type_id") REFERENCES financial_types ("financial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_financial_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_segment_id") REFERENCES financial_segments ("financial_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_types" (
  "financial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial type */,
  "financial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial category (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES financial_categories ("financial_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year (e.g., FY 2022, FY 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_categories" (
  "financial_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial category */,
  "financial_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent financial category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_segments" (
  "financial_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial segment */,
  "financial_segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial segment */,
  "parent_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent financial segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, accountant, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_financial_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "financial_statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data in the statement */,
  "statement_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of financial statement (e.g., income statement, balance sheet) */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial statement */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the financial statement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial statement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_statement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_type_id") REFERENCES statement_types ("statement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_financial_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_types" (
  "statement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement type */,
  "statement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the statement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statement type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent statement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of account (e.g., asset, liability, equity) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_entries" (
  "journal_entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account affected by the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "debit" REAL /* Debit amount */,
  "credit" REAL /* Credit amount */,
  "financial_statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the journal entry belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the journal entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the journal entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_entries_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_entries_financial_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("financial_statement_id")
)
